title: Old and New
description: Old and New is a mod that adds features from MC Earth, The Joke updates and Removed features to the game and changes them a bit.
body:
**This mod will only be updated to new versions but not get new content anymore**

Old and New Adds features form:
Minecraft Earth
The April Fools updates
Removed features 
Unimplemented Features
New Features

--------------------------------
New Blocks:
Swaggiest Stairs Ever (April fools) 
Swaggiest Slabs Ever (New) 
Carved Melons (Minecraft Earth) 
Barrel of Fish (Unimplemented) 
Block of Feathers (New) 
Block of Fancy Feathers (New) 
Block of Ruby (New) 
Ruby Ore (Removed) 
Cheese (April fools) 
Pink Daisy (Minecraft Earth) 
Buttercup (Minecraft Earth) 
Glowing Obsidian (Removed)
USB Charger block (April Fools)

--------------------------------
New Items:
Longer String (April fools) Compact way of storing string.
Footprints (April fools) 
Fancy Feathers (Minecraft Earth)
Ruby (Removed/Minecraft Earth) Can be used to buy from the wandering trader.
Reality Vision (April fools) Gives 2 seconds night vision.
Ankle Monitor (April fools) Gives Slowness.
Crystalized hunny (Unimplemented) 

--------------------------------
New Crafting Recepies:
Carved Pumpkins can be crafted in a crafting table.
Items that need 2 or more string in their recepie can be crafed with longer string.
